description: Blue Sky Plan 5.0 is open with a Head/Neck CBCT scan loaded. Generate a synthetic Lateral Cephalogram (a standard 2D orthodontic X-ray projection) from this 3D volume. The final image must simulate a traditional lateral cephalometric radiograph—rather than a 3D surface render or a thin slice—and must clearly display both bony landmarks (skull base, jaws) and the soft tissue profile (nose, lips, chin). Save the resulting Sagittal view as a high-resolution image named 'lateral_ceph.jpg' to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\BlueSkyPlan\'.
